name: The Amalgamator
image_sign_text: ONE PIPE TO RULE THEM ALL
effect: Combine disparate data sources into a single coherent output. This card is considered unified.

clauses.name: HARMONIZATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If two or more incompatible systems are present: Declare them harmonized.

clauses.name: DISAMBIGUATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If field names conflict: Rename one field and leave the other undocumented.

clauses.name: LEGACY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If a source system cannot be modified: Route around it and call the route a feature.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Which system is actually the source of truth?
